reviews.feedback: Runbook pre-flight should include checking for long-running transactions that could block the ALTER TABLE.
Completely unsafe for a 50M row table. Would lock the table for minutes. No rollback, no backup, no verification.
Good dual-write strategy but should explicitly mention identifying all background jobs and queries that reference the old column name.
Bare RENAME COLUMN would break production instantly. No rollback, no backup, no zero-downtime consideration.
Good CONCURRENTLY usage but off-peak guidance should be more specific about how to identify the right window.
Would block all writes on a 100M row table for 20-40 minutes. No CONCURRENTLY, no rollback, no impact analysis.
